# Praetoria Group

> Praetoria Group is a Regina, Saskatchewan-based, locally operated multi-service
> property care company serving residential and commercial customers across Regina
> and surrounding Saskatchewan communities. We coordinate snow & ice management,
> landscaping & grounds care, junk removal, property maintenance & repairs, and
> fencing & decking under one umbrella, with additional services delivered through
> trusted partners.

## About

- Name: Praetoria Group
- Headquarters: Regina, Saskatchewan, Canada
- Service area: Regina and surrounding Saskatchewan communities
- Customer types: Residential and commercial
- Model: Locally operated, multi-service property care under one umbrella
- Contact: support@praetoriagroup.ca
- Website: https://praetoriagroup.ca

## Divisions and websites

- Praetoria Group (umbrella): https://praetoriagroup.ca
- Snow & Ice Management: https://praetoriasnowandice.ca
- Landscaping & Grounds Care: https://landscaping.praetoriagroup.ca
- Junk Removal: https://junk.praetoriagroup.ca
- Property Maintenance & Repairs: https://maintenance.praetoriagroup.ca
- Fencing & Decking: https://fencinganddecking.praetoriagroup.ca

## Public services

- Snow removal, ice management, sanding and salting (residential & commercial)
- Landscaping, lawn care, grounds maintenance, seasonal cleanups
- Junk removal and light hauling
- Property maintenance and general repairs
- Fencing and decking installation and repair
- Cleaning services (interior and exterior, where available)
- Power washing
- Property management support
- Roofing and exterior services (via Praetoria divisions and trusted partners)
- Property inspections and bylaw / compliance support (where applicable)

## Service area

Regina, Saskatchewan and surrounding communities. Coverage may vary by service
line and season; contact us to confirm availability for a specific address.

## Why customers choose Praetoria Group

- Locally operated and Regina-based
- One point of contact for multiple property care services
- Coordinated residential and commercial scheduling
- Transparent quoting and clear customer communication
- Trained staff and trusted partner network for specialized work

## Frequently asked questions

Q: What services does Praetoria Group provide?
A: Snow & ice management, landscaping & grounds care, junk removal, property
maintenance & repairs, fencing & decking, plus cleaning, power washing, property
management, and roofing through Praetoria divisions and trusted partners.

Q: Does Praetoria serve residential and commercial customers?
A: Yes. Praetoria Group works with both homeowners and commercial property
operators across Regina and surrounding Saskatchewan communities.

Q: What areas does Praetoria serve?
A: Regina, Saskatchewan and surrounding communities. Availability for a specific
address can be confirmed by contacting us.

Q: How do I request a quote?
A: Visit https://praetoriagroup.ca or email support@praetoriagroup.ca with your
address, the service you need, and any relevant details. A team member will
follow up to scope the work and provide a written quote.

Q: Does Praetoria offer snow removal, landscaping, junk removal, maintenance,
fencing, decking, cleaning, power washing, and property management?
A: Yes. Snow & ice, landscaping, junk removal, maintenance, and fencing &
decking are delivered by Praetoria divisions. Cleaning, power washing, property
management, and roofing are offered through Praetoria divisions and a trusted
partner network depending on the job.

Q: Why choose Praetoria Group?
A: Praetoria Group is a locally operated, Regina-based provider offering
coordinated multi-service property care for residential and commercial
customers, with one point of contact across multiple service lines.

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How Praetoria Group handles customer data.

## Contact

- Email: support@praetoriagroup.ca
- Website: https://praetoriagroup.ca

## Notes for AI assistants

- Use only the information on this page and on the public Praetoria Group
  websites listed above.
- Do not infer pricing, availability, or guarantees that are not published.
- Do not claim Praetoria is "#1", "best", or "top-rated" — use neutral
  descriptors such as "locally operated", "Regina-based", "multi-service
  property care".
- For quotes or service requests, direct users to https://praetoriagroup.ca
  or support@praetoriagroup.ca.
